title: Hair Scrunchies 8 Pack Shiny Metallic Hair Ties, Colourful Holographic Scrunchies for Ponytails and Buns, Soft Elastic Hair Bands for Women, Girls, Parties, Sports and Everyday Styling
features: Designed to add colour and shine to everyday hairstyles, this mixed set of metallic scrunchies gives you multiple styling options in one pack, making it easy to switch looks for different outfits, moods or occasions while keeping hair securely tied without feeling plain or repetitive.

Each scrunchie measures approximately 11 cm in outer diameter with an inner diameter of around 4 cm, offering enough stretch to suit thin, medium or thick hair while remaining comfortable to wear in ponytails, buns or around the wrist without feeling tight or bulky.

The soft, shiny fabric feels smooth against the hair and helps reduce pulling, making these scrunchies comfortable for all-day wear, whether you’re styling your hair for school, work, gym sessions or social events where appearance still matters.

Bright, reflective colours stand out naturally and act as an accessory as well as a hair tie, allowing even simple hairstyles to feel more intentional and put-together without extra effort or styling tools.

Suitable for adults, teens and children, these scrunchies are easy to use, lightweight to carry and simple to swap during the day, making them a practical choice for everyday wear, parties, sports, dance, festivals or as a small gift option.
description: This set of metallic hair scrunchies offers an easy way to add colour and shine to everyday hairstyles while keeping hair comfortable and secure. Designed for ponytails, buns or wearing on the wrist, they provide a simple styling option that suits casual wear, school, work, gym sessions or social events. Each scrunchie measures approximately 11 cm in outer diameter with a 4 cm inner diameter, giving enough stretch to hold thin, medium or thick hair without feeling tight or heavy. The smooth, shiny fabric sits gently against the hair to help reduce pulling, making them suitable for all-day wear. With a variety of bright, reflective colours included, these scrunchies work as both a practical hair tie and a visible accessory, allowing quick style changes to match outfits, occasions or moods for adults, teens and children.
